message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title PFD flow between Openness and 5G core

skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam ParticipantPadding 30
skinparam BoxPadding 15
skinparam ArrowColor #000000
skinparam SequenceLifeLineBorderColor #888888
skinparam SequenceLifeLineBackgroundColor transparent

actor Admin as Admin

box "OpenNESS Controller Components" #bfe7f3
participant "UI/CLI" as UICLI
participant "Af Microservice" as AF
end box

box "5G Core Components" #98f08f
participant "NEF" as NEF
participant "NGC CP Function" as NGCCP
end box

note over NEF,NGCCP
OpenNESS provided
Core component with
limited functionality
end note

participant "NGC_STUB (UDR SMF)" as NGCSTUB

== Get all transactions with PFD ==
Admin -> UICLI : Request all PFD transactions
UICLI -> AF : af/v1/pfd/transaction GET
AF -> NGCSTUB : 3gpp-pfd-management/v1/{scsAsId}/transactions/\nGET
NGCSTUB --> AF : OK: PFD information \\ ERROR
AF --> UICLI : OK: PFD information \\ ERROR
UICLI --> Admin : PFD details

== Get transactions with transactionId ==
Admin -> UICLI : Request transaction with\ntransactionId
UICLI -> AF : af/v1/pfd/transactions/{transactionId}\nGET
AF -> NGCSTUB : 3gpp-pfd-management/v1/{scsAsId}/transactions/{transactionId}\nGET
NGCSTUB --> AF : OK: PFD information \\ ERROR
AF --> UICLI : OK: PFD information \\ ERROR
UICLI --> Admin : PFD details

== Get transactions with applicationId ==
Admin -> UICLI : Request transactions with\napplicationId
UICLI -> AF : af/v1/pfd/transactions/{transactionId}/applications/{appId}\nGET
AF -> NGCSTUB : 3gpp-pfd-management/v1/{scsAsId}/transactions/{transactionId}/applications/{appId}\nGET
NGCSTUB --> AF : OK: PFD information \\ ERROR
AF --> UICLI : OK: PFD information \\ ERROR
UICLI --> Admin : PFD details

@enduml
```
